race.comment: LOOK HERE (11) created a big impression at start nine when she got off the mark with a dominant win over 1600m at this track in the heavy going. Drawn out again and looks to have the upside to overcome the wide gate. WATOTO (5) massive flop as fav when he went out quickly before tiring in the straight to run twelfth over 1400m at Bendigo. Claim helps again and proven at the 1600m. Gets one more chance in this easier race. CAYMAN ISLAND (6) inching towards a win after he gripped on strongly to secure second over 1600m at Albury in BM66 grade. Returned solid figures last start and no surprise to see him take this out. DOUBTFREE (1) went down narrowly last start, finishing third at Corowa over 1600m, beaten only 0.9 lengths. Include.
